data.task_instructions: Run a compact cross-domain pass over this zebrafish segmentation paper. Extract one chemical condition, one phenotype statement, and one central gene supported by the paper. Each extractor must use read_chunk span IDs with record_evidence for one supporting evidence unit and must leave identity/ontology resolution to validators. Preserve the explicit zebrafish organism context as ZFIN/NCBITaxon:7955 selector hints for gene or phenotype candidates; those hints are not final identity resolution.

data.custom_input: Read the loaded paper and extract exactly one chemical or experimental-condition candidate: SB225002 treatment in embryonic zebrafish segmentation experiments. Preserve dose/timing/context when present and use read_chunk span IDs with record_evidence for one supporting evidence unit. Do not extract phenotype statements or genes in this step, and do not resolve ChEBI or condition ontology IDs in the extractor.
data.step_goal: Read the loaded paper and extract exactly one chemical or experimental-condition candidate: SB225002 treatment in embryonic zebrafish segmentation experiments. Preserve dose/timing/context when present and use read_chunk span IDs with record_evidence for one supporting evidence unit. Do not extract phenotype statements or genes in this step, and do not resolve ChEBI or condition ontology IDs in the extractor.

data.custom_input: Read the loaded paper and extract exactly one phenotype assertion candidate: mid-trunk myotome boundary or segmentation defects in embryonic zebrafish after SB225002 treatment. Preserve the Danio rerio/ZFIN/NCBITaxon:7955 organism context as selector hints and use read_chunk span IDs with record_evidence for one supporting evidence unit. Do not extract chemicals or genes in this step, and do not resolve phenotype ontology IDs in the extractor.

run_finished.response:
Completed compact cross-domain curation pass over the zebrafish segmentation paper.

Produced:
- One chemical/condition candidate: SB225002 treatment, validated as CHEBI:93074.
- One phenotype assertion candidate: mid-trunk myotome boundary defects in Danio rerio / NCBITaxon:7955 context; phenotype ontology resolution remained unresolved as instructed.
- One central gene candidate: zebrafish her1, validated as ZFIN:ZDB-GENE-980526-125, taxon NCBITaxon:7955.

agent_prompts.chemical_extractor: Read the loaded paper and extract exactly one chemical or experimental-condition candidate: SB225002 treatment in embryonic zebrafish segmentation experiments. Preserve dose/timing/context when present and use read_chunk span IDs with record_evidence for one supporting evidence unit. Do not extract phenotype statements or genes in this step, and do not resolve ChEBI or condition ontology IDs in the extractor.
agent_prompts.gene_extractor: Read the loaded paper and extract exactly one central gene candidate: zebrafish her1 in the segmentation/small-molecule-screen context. Preserve Danio rerio, ZFIN, and NCBITaxon:7955 hints and use read_chunk span IDs with record_evidence for one supporting evidence unit. Do not extract chemicals or phenotype statements in this step, and do not resolve gene IDs in the extractor.
agent_prompts.phenotype_extractor: Read the loaded paper and extract exactly one phenotype assertion candidate: mid-trunk myotome boundary or segmentation defects in embryonic zebrafish after SB225002 treatment. Preserve the Danio rerio/ZFIN/NCBITaxon:7955 organism context as selector hints and use read_chunk span IDs with record_evidence for one supporting evidence unit. Do not extract chemicals or genes in this step, and do not resolve phenotype ontology IDs in the extractor.

trial.prompt: Run a compact cross-domain pass over this zebrafish segmentation paper. Extract one chemical condition, one phenotype statement, and one central gene supported by the paper. Each extractor must use read_chunk span IDs with record_evidence for one supporting evidence unit and must leave identity/ontology resolution to validators. Preserve the explicit zebrafish organism context as ZFIN/NCBITaxon:7955 selector hints for gene or phenotype candidates; those hints are not final identity resolution.
trial.title: Small molecule screen in embryonic zebrafish using modular variations to target segmentation
